rendered_slack_text:
:robot_face: *[FLEX AGENT] Weekly Monday — week of 2026-04-27*
_Draft week-ahead. Review, edit, publish to #product-cleo-card when ready._

*Carrying over from last week*
_First weekly cycle — no prior review to reference._

*This week's meetings*
*Mon* — Flex Card X-Team Alignment @ 16:30 — Maia, Lea, Tylar, Maddie Ford, John B, Louise, Ladi + Jago (organiser)
*Mon* — Cleo New Product Implementation Call @ 17:00 — WebBank (Jenna Hansen, Derek Carter, Cade Sorensen, Ali Bowman + 8 more WB) + Cleo squad (~15) — prep: WB focusing on product construct + JIT funding; LC Josh attending for product-classification discussion
*Wed* — [External] Cleo<>Marqeta Product Deep Dive @ 16:00 — Marqeta (Jared Wright, J. Mah + 8 more) + Cleo eng squad (Ladi, Lea, Alex.M, Gavin, Charly + more)
*Thu* — Cleo New Product Implementation Call (Thurs.) @ 15:30 — WebBank + Cleo squad
*Thu* — [External] Cleo<>Marqeta Product Deep Dive @ 16:00 — Marqeta + Cleo eng squad

*Action items by owner*
*Jago*
• Chase outside counsel's analysis on Flex Card product classification — — — P0
• Get sandbox access timeline from Marqeta — — — P0
• Push Marqeta for 2x weekly 2-hour live sessions for next few weeks — — — P0
• Set up weekly 3-way recurring (Jago + Ladi + Lea) on WebBank + Marqeta — — — P1
*Ladi*
• Share multi-use card options doc with Jago + Dogan — — — P2

*WebBank checklist state*
• Total: 94 rows · Not Started: 91 · In Review: 3 · Done: 0 · Blocked: 0
• Party leaders: SP (~48), Compliance (~44), BSA (~22), Other (~18), Credit (~11)
• Status changes since last Friday: 2 (DP11.1 Flex Card ACH Bill Pay + DP11.2 Flex Card ACH Direct Deposit — both added at In Review); +14 net new items added to checklist since 2026-04-24
_Due-date prioritisation pending internal review._

*Weekend signal* (team-relevant only)
• jwright@marqeta.com — Cleo <> Marqeta Update 4/24/26 — Partial MQ technical answers received; more responses pending — ⚠️ awaiting Jago reply — https://mail.google.com/mail/u/0/#inbox/19dc17cb88ded9ae
• jmah@marqeta.com — Re: Cleo <> Marqeta — Sandbox IPs whitelisted; Mastercard Passkeys timeline update from MQ product team — ⚠️ awaiting Jago reply — https://mail.google.com/mail/u/0/#inbox/19db683120585792
• jenna.hansen@webbank.com — RE: Cleo 4/27 Agenda — WB confirmed scope for today's Mon call; LC Josh attending — https://mail.google.com/mail/u/0/#inbox/19dc01dd11ddc57e
• jwright@marqeta.com — Marqeta Product Deep Dive invites (x2) — Wed 29 + Thu 30 Apr 16:00–17:00 BST — needs accept/decline — https://mail.google.com/mail/u/0/#inbox/19dc17eb28576848

*Top risks*
• Bank & Compliance (CP Risk #2): WB LC Josh raising product-classification challenge today (debit/hybrid recharacterisation, Reg II) — Cleo entering without OC-backed legal position
• Bank & Compliance: Outside counsel analysis outstanding — no response yet from Colin Jones; P0 action item unresolved
• Platform Foundations / Marqeta (CP Risk #1): Eng sandbox still blocked; no confirmed timeline — Marqeta deep-dives Wed/Thu are the next credible gate
• Card Issuance & Fulfilment (CP Risk #1): Mastercard BIN gated on Marqeta agreement (gated on ACH resolution) — Idemia 3-month plastics lead time hasn't started
